semantic.role: Defines the issue template behavior for the ArchSpine repository, guiding contributors toward appropriate communication channels.
responsibilities: Disabling blank issues to enforce structured submissions
Providing a contact link to GitHub Discussions for Q&A and general talk
outOfScope: User guides or tutorials for ArchSpine

English.purpose: To streamline contributor interactions by preventing unstructured issue reports and funneling questions and discussions to a dedicated forum.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for contributors and users of the ArchSpine project. This configuration file sits in the repository’s issue template system and is read by GitHub when someone opens a new issue.
key_takeaways: Blank issues are disabled – every new issue must use a template.
Questions and general discussion are directed to GitHub Discussions, not the issue tracker.
This is a small, non-functional configuration that solely dictates issue submission behavior.
